prompt: A photorealistic, high-quality image of a {argument name="subject description" default="young Asian woman"} with long wavy brown hair, sitting precariously on top of an {argument name="landmark" default="ornate, colorful stone fruit finial spire of the Sagrada Familia"}. She is casually eating a {argument name="food item" default="hamburger"}, holding it with both hands near her mouth. She is wearing a {argument name="outfit" default="beige sleeveless wrap jumpsuit with a tie waist and metallic gold pointed-toe stiletto heels"}. The background features a breathtaking, slightly blurred aerial panoramic view of {argument name="background city" default="a dense European city resembling Barcelona"}, stretching out to the ocean under a clear blue sky. Cinematic lighting, surreal juxtaposition, highly detailed.
translatedPrompt: 一张照片级逼真、高质量的图像，主角是一位 {argument name="subject description" default="年轻亚裔女性"}，留着波浪状棕色长发，摇摇欲坠地坐在 {argument name="landmark" default="圣家堂华丽多彩的石质水果尖顶"} 之上。她正悠闲地吃着一个 {argument name="food item" default="汉堡"}，双手捧着靠近嘴边。她身穿一件 {argument name="outfit" default="米色无袖系带连体裤，搭配金属金色尖头细高跟鞋"}。背景是令人惊叹、略显模糊的 {argument name="background city" default="类似巴塞罗那的密集欧洲城市"} 空中全景，在湛蓝的天空下一直延伸至大海。电影级光影，超现实并置，高度细节化。

breakdown.creativeCore: 超现实地标用餐肖像：生成一张照片级逼真的图像，展示一个人坐在著名建筑地标上悠闲地吃快餐。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, photorealistic, cinematic]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
